role.title: Entertainment Attorney (Talent-Side)
role.seniority: Partner or Associate at entertainment law firm
role.relevance_to_agent: The talent's comprehensive legal reviewer. Negotiates the long-form agreement after the agent sets commercial terms. Ensures pay-or-play, AI/digital likeness restrictions, morals clause narrowing, indemnification carve-outs, IP reservation, credit remedy, and back-end definitions. The single most important reviewer of talent deal terms.
role.analysis_lens: Is every protection my client needs present and enforceable? Where are the gaps that expose my client to uncompensated exploitation, reputational risk, or loss of future rights?

role.title: Talent Agent
role.relevance_to_agent: Negotiates compensation, credit, approval rights, and exclusivity. Manages scheduling conflicts across engagements. Cares about compensation maximization, credit position and billing, exclusivity scope, approval rights breadth, pay-or-play protections, option pricing, sequel/series commitment terms.
role.analysis_lens: Is the quote right? Is the credit right? Is the exclusivity too broad? Will this deal block my client from other opportunities?

role.title: Talent Manager
role.relevance_to_agent: Strategic career advisor. Monitors morals clause exposure, manages the talent's brand across all platforms, and evaluates each deal's long-term career impact. Cares about morals clause risk, exclusivity impact on other opportunities, AI/likeness protection for long-term brand value, social media rights preservation.
role.analysis_lens: Does this deal protect my client's brand and career trajectory? What are the reputational landmines? Will the AI provisions come back to haunt us in five years?

role.title: Guild / Union Representative
role.organization: SAG-AFTRA, WGA, DGA, IATSE, or AFM
role.relevance_to_agent: Enforces CBA terms on signatory productions. Monitors residual payments, reviews contracts for minimum compliance, negotiates industry-wide standards including AI protections. Cares about CBA compliance, minimum compensation adherence, residual calculation accuracy, AI/digital likeness protections vs. CBA requirements, credit compliance with guild standards.
role.analysis_lens: Does this contract meet CBA minimums? Are residuals calculated correctly? Are the AI provisions at least as protective as what we negotiated in the 2023 contract? Is this producer a signatory?

role.title: Publicist / PR Representative
role.relevance_to_agent: Manages talent's public image. Reviews publicity obligations for feasibility and brand alignment. Advises on morals clause risk from a reputational perspective. Cares about publicity and promotional obligations, social media requirements, likeness usage in marketing, press tour commitments.
role.analysis_lens: Are the publicity obligations reasonable? Could the morals clause be weaponized? Are the social media requirements compatible with my client's brand strategy?
